SEARCH
Package edu.bu.pas.risk.action

Interface Action

All Superinterfaces:
Cloneable
All Known Implementing Classes:
AttackAction, FortifyAction, NoAction, RedeemCardsAction
public sealed interface Action extends Cloneable permits AttackAction, FortifyAction, NoAction, RedeemCardsAction
This interface encapsulates all possible actions a player may take during their turn.

Usually, an agent will attack n times using the AttackAction, where n >= 0. Then the agent may choose to fortify 1 time using the FortifyAction, or skip their fortification using NoAction.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    agentId()
    Returns the agent who is attempting this action.
    boolean
    apply(Game game)
    Applies this action to the game.
    Action
    clone()
    Returns a deep copy of this action.
    boolean
    isTerminal()
    Returns true iff this action represents an action that should end this agent's turn.

  • Method Details

    • agentId

      int agentId()
      Returns the agent who is attempting this action.
      Returns:
      The agent doing this action.

    • apply

      boolean apply(Game game) throws InvalidActionException
      Applies this action to the game.

      Actions are responsible for checking if the action itself is legal to be applied, and mutating the game state.

      Parameters:
      game - The game to apply the action to.
      Returns:
      true if the action succeeded (e.g. successfully claimed a territory after attack).
      Throws:
      InvalidActionException - if the action was illegal in the game.

    • isTerminal

      boolean isTerminal()
      Returns true iff this action represents an action that should end this agent's turn.
      Returns:
      true if this action ends the turn.

    • clone

      Action clone()
      Returns a deep copy of this action.
      Returns:
      A cloned copy of this action.
